entrypoint.ai_usage_note: Load index.html first for the full operating framework. Use dashboard_index.json for triage, ssot_seed_map.json for routing, manifest.json for full extraction, and ssot/ for verification. Use the linked placeholder pages as future extension points.

homepage.purpose: Primary AI operating instructions and virtual world design framework

dashboard_index.purpose: Fast source triage by domain, relevance, group, SSOT target, and module

ssot_seed_map.purpose: Maps source IDs to candidate SSOT documents and recommended agent modules

manifest.purpose: Full source records with extraction fields, traceability, quotes, and implementation notes

framework_doc.purpose: Canonical framework source for world design behavior and required output structure

generator.purpose: Manifest generation pipeline for rebuilding the JSON assets

ssot_folder.purpose: Original source corpus used for verification and traceability

recommended_access_pattern: Use dashboard_index.json to shortlist relevant records.
Use ssot_seed_map.json to identify SSOT targets and agent modules.
Use manifest.json for complete extraction data.
Open original files in ssot/ when exact evidence is needed.
agent_rules: Prefer original source files over extracted metadata if any conflict appears.
Preserve traceability to source file name and path.
Use the virtual world design framework in index.html as the behavioral contract for generation.
